text: 2. All  Work  shall  be  performed  in  accordance  with  all  applicable  codes,  ordinances,  standards,  and  other  local requirements  of  the  AHJ.  If  clarifications  made  by  Contractor  conflict  with  any  specification,  local,  or  state requirement, it shall be the responsibility of the Subcontractor, as an expert in the subject Work, to notify Contractor of such conflicts prior to signing this document.
